title: Boostable
description: Defines the conditions and behavior of a rideable entity's boost.

boost_items.title: Boost Items
boost_items.description:
List of items that can be used to boost while riding this entity.

Sample values:
• pig: [{"item":"carrotOnAStick","damage":2,"replace_i...
• strider: [{"item":"warped_fungus_on_a_stick","damage":1,...

damage.description: This is the damage that the item will take each time it is used.

item.description: Name of the item that can be used to boost.

replace_item.description: The item used to boost will become this item once it is used up.

duration.title: Duration
duration.description:
Time in seconds for the boost.

Sample values:
• pig: 3
• strider: 16

speed_multiplier.title: Speed Multiplier
speed_multiplier.description:
Factor by which the entity's normal speed increases. E.g. 2.0 means go twice as fast.

Sample values:
• pig: 1.35
